pageContext.name: Darth Vader™ Hand Magnet
pageContext.description: Sideshow is excited to present this Star Wars™ deluxe sculptural magnet is the final in the first wave of Regal Robot's Separation Collection, a series that captures great moments from the classic films we love. This magnetic mini sculpture is based on Darth Vader's™ Hand from Star Wars: Return of the Jedi™, straight out of the climactic moments of the original trilogy!  Like the others in this series, these were designed, prototyped and produced in the USA, each magnet is hand-cast in solid resin and hand-painted by the FX artists in our New York studio with distinctive faux finishes. They ship ready to display.  Add this great new magnet to your collection, home, office, man-cave or fridge!
